Bhooth Bangla BO: Akshay Kumar starrer marches towards Rs 100 crore in week 1
description: 'Bhooth Bangla', directed by Priyadarshan and starring Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal Yadav, Mithila Palkar and Asrani, is closing in on the Rs. 100 crore India net milestone as it completes its first week in theatres. With a cumulative India net of Rs. 79.02 crore and a worldwide gross of Rs. 127.37 crore after seven days, the U/A certified horror-comedy has delivered a strong opening week despite competing against 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' in its fifth week and a full IPL 2026 season. Marking Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan's reunion after 16 years, the 145-minute supernatural thriller follows Arjun Acharya confronting the demonic entity Vadhusur in his ancestral home in Mangalpur, featuring a nostalgic ensemble of Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav and the late Asrani.

description: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: 'We are installing tracking software in your machines': Meta to US employees
description: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: Dianna Russini’s husband under scrutiny over Vrabel affair rumors
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and the former New York Times’ reporter and NFL insider, Dianna Russini, continue to dominate headlines as their alleged affair rumors swirl. As Dianna Russini has stepped down from her role at The Athletic, new allegations have been made about her marital life that she has always tried to keep out of the spotlight.
